segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: Gentlemen, please fasten your seatbelts. We're experiencing turbulent weather.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAIS, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: Come on, Owais, lighten up. We're not going to crash.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Owais, a hint of annoyance on his face.

segments.speaker: LEO
segments.line: Yeah, I've flown in worse conditions. This is nothing.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of Sam, a smirk on his face.

segments.speaker: AREEBA
segments.line: Pilot, I've been told to inform you that we're approaching our cruising altitude. All passengers are seated and buckled up.
segments.visual_cue: Wide shot of Leo, a confident smile on his face.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: Thank you, Areeba. Please keep an eye on these gentlemen. I don't want any trouble.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Areeba, a warm smile on her face.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: Trouble? What are you talking about, Owais? We're just trying to enjoy the flight.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of Owais, a stern look on his face.

segments.speaker: LEO
segments.line: Yeah, and I'm starting to think this plane doesn't have any turbulence at all.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Sam, a raised eyebrow.

segments.speaker: LEO
segments.line: See, I told you it was nothing. This is just a little bump.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: Yeah, and Owais is just being a buzzkill. He needs to relax.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Leo, a triumphant grin on his face.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: That's it. I've had enough of your nonsense. Leo, Sam, please report to the cockpit immediately.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of Sam, a chuckling expression.

segments.speaker: AREEBA
segments.line: Gentlemen, please follow the pilot's instructions. We need to secure the plane.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Owais, a firm jawline.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: You two are a menace. I'm going to have to sedate you if you don't behave.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAIS, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: Sedate us? You can't do that. We're paying customers.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Owais, a hint of anger in his voice.

segments.speaker: LEO
segments.line: Yeah, and I'm not going to calm down just because you're being a party pooper.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of Sam, a defiant expression.

segments.speaker: AREEBA
segments.line: Pilot, I've secured the passengers. They're safely buckled in and calm.
segments.visual_cue: Wide shot of Leo, a challenging look on his face.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: Good. I'm going to have to rely on Areeba to keep an eye on you two. Stay out of trouble.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Areeba, a reassuring smile on her face.
